Audit Rule Thresholds

Customize the default thresholds and parameters used by the analysis checklist rules.
Duplicate & Same-Day
Duplicate payment window (default: 14 days)
Exclude account if Pay Bill payments exceed this (default: 12)
Max allowed same-day payments before flagging (default: 1)
Same-day count exceeding this raises WARNING (default: 3)
Caps & Allowance Thresholds
Max single TA bill amount allowed (default: ₹19,000)
Max annual TA bill cumulative limit (default: ₹50,000)
Max number of TA bills per year (default: 6)
Single/total medical payment threshold (default: ₹50,000)
Max allowed payment in CASH mode (default: ₹5,000)
Timing & Dormancy
Days of inactivity before checking reactivation (default: 270)
Min amount to check on reactivation (default: ₹50,000)
Reactivation gap raising HIGH RISK severity (default: 365)
Max average days between payments to flag (default: 5.0)
Avg days below this raises HIGH RISK (default: 2.0)
Max days between duplicate amount payments (default: 30)
Limits & Splits
Limit to check cumulative scheme total (default: ₹5 Crore)
Limit to check single bill total (default: ₹1 Crore)
Threshold limits for split billing detection
Fuzzy Match & Stats
Similarity below this triggers mismatch flag (default: 75%)
Flag payments within this % below FVC limits (default: 2.0%)
Flag accounts if round payments exceed this % (default: 20%)
Exclude duplicate payments below this amount (default: ₹5,000)
Major head codes (comma-separated) to scan for duplicate payments in Rule 06E (default: 2235, 2245, 8011)
Flag bank account if PAY BILL payments exceed this in 1 year (default: 25)
Flag concentration if top 10 parties exceed this (default: 50%)
